name: Looker
tagline: Business intelligence platform by Google Cloud
description: Looker is a modern BI platform by Google Cloud that uses a proprietary modelling language (LookML) to create a semantic layer on top of your data warehouse. Popular with data teams who want governed, reusable metrics across the organisation.
use_cases: Your data team wants a governed semantic layer so every team queries the same definitions for metrics like revenue or churn
You're on Google Cloud and want a BI tool that integrates natively with BigQuery
You need to embed analytics dashboards directly inside your own product or customer portal
Your organisation has dedicated data engineers who can own and maintain LookML models long-term
